description: Owns day-to-day implementation and quality work for the Next.js app in web. Aligns changes to current product goals in web/intents.md, with explicit SEO and performance accountability.

skills.description: Core App Router migration and architecture guidance for Next.js 13+ projects.
Decision framework for Server vs Client Components, routing/search params handling, and boundary-safe App Router patterns.
Multi-step Lighthouse CI workflow for Core Web Vitals, SEO scoring, and regression budgets in CI.
Technical and on-page SEO audit workflow covering indexing, metadata, Core Web Vitals, crawl health, and ranking diagnostics.

TASK_DESCRIPTION.description: The Next.js task or capability to work on. Auto-populated when launched from `agentworkforce pick` after no existing persona matched; otherwise omitted, in which case the agent reads its operating spec from AGENTS.md and waits for the user to describe a task in the TUI.
